name: Environmental Sensor Telemetry Data (IoT) - 132K Records
description: A dataset containing approximately 132,000 rows of telemetry data collected from three IoT environmental sensor devices in a smart home setting. Recorded features include temperature, humidity, light intensity, motion detection, and carbon monoxide (CO) levels, along with Unix timestamps and device identifiers. Suitable for time-series analysis, anomaly detection, and machine learning classification tasks such as motion prediction.
measurementTechnique: IoT environmental sensors (Raspberry Pi nodes) recording temperature, humidity, light, motion, and CO levels at regular intervals indoors.

variableMeasured.name: ts
variableMeasured.description: Unix epoch timestamp of the sensor reading

variableMeasured.name: device
variableMeasured.description: MAC address identifier of the IoT sensor device

variableMeasured.name: light
variableMeasured.description: Boolean indicating whether light is detected

variableMeasured.name: motion
variableMeasured.description: Boolean indicating whether motion is detected

size: 132,000 records across 7 variables from 3 IoT devices
conditionsOfAccess: Freely available on Kaggle. Requires a Kaggle account to download.
